g.text: ﬁcial Gray #EEEEEE is Neutral 200 and of
Exact vector gradients extracted from the Illustrator logo source. Keep normal sRGB interpolation.
• Use the exact stops, direction and 100% opacity for logo and approved decorative brand applications.
• Do not substitute solid Cyan 500 (#00E9ED) for gradient cyan (#00FFE5).
• Do not substitute Orange 600 (#FD5901) for gradient orange (#FF3C00).
• Do not add “in oklch” to these logo gradients; that changes the original interpolation.
Color endpoints come from the PDF's vector shading functions; CT
A examples normalize them to light
A tokens use a 90° light-to-dark orientation. Purple and yellow retain their decorative source directions.
A gradients use 90° light-to-dark orientation; preserve the original vector paths and source directions for decorative bold visuals.
A levels for conversion-focused web and mobile interfaces.
ypography creates hierarchy ﬁrst; color reinforces it. Do not turn every heading into a brand color
Free-roaming VR for friends, families and teams.
Helper text, dates and low emphasis.
Underline on hover and keyboard focus.
Non-essential only; not normal body copy
N950 on White = 19.59:1 · N600 on White = 5.39:1 · Purple 600 on White = 6.87:1.
1:1. Use it only for disabled, placeholder or large non-critical text.
Never encode hierarchy or state by color alone.
2px Neutral 50 inner ring + 6px Cyan 700 halo. Keep the ring visible on every surface.
Primary uses the approved cool gradient; secondary and tertiary remain lower emphasis.
Booking, payment or the page's single success action.
16px label · 24px side padding · 56px height · full width on mobile.
Alternative path, game selection, comparison or details.
Never give it the same visual weight as the primary CT
Low-commitment disclosure, learn-more or back action.
Keep a 44px hit area even when the control looks like text.
Underline on hover/focus, not by color alone.
Do not show multiple ﬁlled brand treatments as equal conversion buttons.
16px label, 24px side padding and 56px height; full width on mobile.
All controls keep at least a 44×44px comfortable hit area.
Cool gradient = day conversion. Purple = identity
Orange is not a second day-mode primary CT
. Also explain why the action is unavailable.
Do not hide essential information in low-contrast text.
, label and destination identical between mobile, desktop and booking ﬂow
isual hierarchy must survive at 320px viewport width.
Low-glare semantic text, layered neutral surfaces and a warm-gradient CT
A system for web and mobile.
Use neutral steps for hierarchy and elevation. Reserve Orange for actions, links and selected emphasis.

Disabled only; not normal body copy
Neutral 600 on N950 = 3.63:1. Use it only for disabled or large non-critical content.
void pure-white body copy across long passages; N300 reduces glare while remaining highly legible.
The approved light-to-dark warm gradient is the only ﬁlled conversion treatment.
Booking, payment or the page's single success action.
16px label · 24px side padding · 56px height · full width on mobile.
Alternative path, game selection, comparison or details.
Use an Orange border and label, never a second ﬁlled Orange button.
Low-commitment disclosure, learn-more or back action.
Keep a 44px hit area even when the control looks like text.
Underline on hover/focus, not by color alone.
2px Neutral 50 inner ring + 6px Cyan 700 halo. Keep the ring visible on every surface.
2px Neutral 950 inner ring + 6px Cyan 300 halo. Keep the ring visible on every surface.
A per decision block. Purple remains an identity accent.
Do not alternate warm and cool gradients for equivalent actions.
Keep Neutral 950 for default, hover and pressed states.
16px label, 24px side padding and 56px height; full width on mobile.
All controls keep at least a 44×44px comfortable hit area.
N800 for depth. Do not rely on shadows alone on dark canvas.
Borders use N700 where separation is essential.
arm gradient = dark conversion. Orange = links. Cyan = focus.
Do not use saturated colors for long text passages.
, label and destination identical between day mode, dark mode and checkout.
Dark mode changes tokens - not information architecture.
